title: Baseline Cyber Security Controls
summary: Sets minimum high-level cybersecurity controls across governance, awareness, defence, incident and log management, third-party and cloud security, OT and IoT security, and audit, and is mandatory for public and private entities that form part of CNI.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: National baseline controls for Bahraini public and private entities.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.critical_infrastructure: National baseline cybersecurity controls for entities in Bahrain.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: National baseline controls including incident and log management.

notes: Related instruments: Supports Bahrain National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2028 and CNI Cybersecurity Controls
